name: Pineapple Cherry Cake
recipeIngredient: 20 oz can crushed pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until fluffy.
2. Add lemon extract and vanilla to the mixture.
3. Gradually add flour and baking powder, alternating with the pineapple.
4. Incorporate well-floured fruit and nuts into the batter.
5. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Pour the batter into pans lined with two layers of greased brown paper.
7. Bake at 275°F for 2-1/2 to 3 hours, or until done.
Origin: Marg Salstrom, mother in law. Bellevue, Washington. Shared by: Sharon Stevens Aug/91
